articles.title: 'America's 250th birthday is our 50th anniversary' - BBC
articles.description: Roger Lieb and Bonnie Taff tell the BBC what it was like to have their wedding on 4 July 1976, America's bicentennial.
articles.content:
For Roger Lieb and Bonnie Taff, this 4 July is a double celebration. Their 50th wedding anniversary falls on Americas 250th birthday.
